source.description: Six-panel generated raster process sheet showing one mason jar with fireflies from construction to finished sketch.
source.notes: Subject, pose, and final elements were locked before image generation for the May 31, 2026 honest backfill lesson.

process_strategy: The jar silhouette, lid, fireflies, grass, and glow marks appear before the final step, which only strengthens and shades them.

final_elements.name: mason jar body
final_elements.description: A rounded glass jar with shoulder curves and a flat base.

final_elements.name: ribbed lid band
final_elements.description: A narrow lid band with simple rib marks on top of the jar.

final_elements.name: glass contour and base lines
final_elements.description: Inner glass edge lines and a curved base that make the jar read as transparent.

final_elements.name: fireflies inside the jar
final_elements.description: Several tiny fireflies shown as simple bodies with small wings or glow dots.

final_elements.name: grass and leaf sprigs
final_elements.description: Small grass blades and leaf sprigs around the jar base.

final_elements.name: soft yellow glow
final_elements.description: Restrained yellow glow around the already drawn fireflies.

frames.visible_job: Draws the jar body guide with shoulders, sides, and base.
Adds the lid band and rib marks on top of the existing jar.
Adds inner contour and base lines so the jar reads as glass.
Adds tiny fireflies and glow-dot positions inside the existing jar.
Adds grass near the base and a restrained yellow glow around the already placed fireflies.

final_step.visible_job: Darkens keeper contours, clarifies lid ribs, glass lines, fireflies, grass, and existing glow.

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
